name: How VECCS Generated $315,300 in Revenue and 10% of Conference Registrations with Website Engagement
subtitle: How VECCS drove 10% of conference registrations with a single website widget.
summary: By utilizing PropFuel Website Engagement, VECCS solved navigation overwhelm on both their association and conference websites. In just a few clicks, they turned a cluttered user experience into a clear path that drove registrations.
quote: For me, it's about moving past the guessing. Everyone has ideas about why something didn't work, but now we have actual data. We know what people are looking for.

name: How AMA Turned Website Visitors Into $304K in Membership Revenue
subtitle: Turning anonymous visitors into paying members with a simple digital shift.
summary: AMA transformed anonymous website traffic into identified prospects and new members. With a single conversational question guiding every visitor, AMA captured thousands of leads and converted them into membership revenue.
quote: We've been able to turn anonymous website traffic into qualified leads and then into paying members. It has been a game changer for us.

name: From 9,700+ Responses to 395 Leads: How ENA Turned Engagement Into Action
subtitle: How ENA engaged members and turned meaningful conversations into action.
summary: ENA used a value-driven Workplace Engagement campaign to connect with members and prospects on the critical topic of workplace violence — turning thousands of responses into qualified leads and new members.
quote: Workplace violence is a serious issue nurses deal with every day, so being able to ask visitors a related question and immediately provide resources was powerful.

name: How ARN Boosted Certification Applications by 32%
subtitle: Personalized member onboarding that drove certification exam applications through a quiz-driven nurture campaign.
summary: ARN personalized member onboarding and boosted certification exam applications by 32% through a highly engaging quiz-driven campaign built in PropFuel.
quote: We always knew certification was a major driver, but PropFuel helped us segment and engage these members in a way we couldn't before.

name: 12% Response Rate on a Website Pop-Up? Here's How ALA Did It
subtitle: Capturing real-time visitor intent helped ALA guide members to action and gather insights traditional tools missed.
summary: ALA used PropFuel's Website Engagement module to capture real-time visitor intent, guiding members to action and surfacing insights traditional tools couldn't see.
quote: It's not pushy, it's not salesy. It's a better way to have real conversations when members are looking for answers.

name: Soaring Member Engagement: How AMA Doubled New Member Engagement with Personalized Onboarding
subtitle: How a 10-email personalized onboarding series doubled new member engagement at AMA.
summary: AMA built a 10-email personalized onboarding series in PropFuel to welcome thousands of new members, doubling engagement and collecting rich feedback from the start.
quote: The shift to PropFuel has completely transformed our ability to connect with new members. Seeing engagement double has been eye-opening.
